author: Ethan
name: LongContext 4096 + Int4 Bank QAT 16L + Full SOTA Stack (Risky)
blurb: Full PR #549 SOTA stack at 4096 context with 16 layers and TRUE int4 QAT: both CastedLinear weights and all bank weights (qo_bank, kv_bank, mlp_up_bank, mlp_down_bank) receive int4 STE fake-quant during training. Bank weights are ~95% of all parameters and were never QAT-prepared in prior int4 experiments. High risk, high reward.
